BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin on the Little Movers Guide print-and-ship edition before the first-of-month budget review with Derek, checking whether renting a small print/fulfillment space pencils out.

CurrentState.Note: Guide side-project only; no employees or instructor pay. Revisit with Derek once the early-access list grows.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Rent increases to $750/mo for the print/fulfillment space
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $945 + $100 increase = $1,045. At $12/subscription, $1,045 / $12 = 87.1 -> 88 subscriptions minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Would need ~30 more early-access subscribers than today to cover the space.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case - rent to $850/mo
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Stretch. Only worth it if the print edition really takes off.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~88-96 subscriptions if I rent print-fulfillment space. At 60 subscribers today there is a gap; grow the early-access list before renting.
ActionItems: Hold off on renting space until the early-access list passes 90
Revisit at the first-of-month budget review with Derek
